overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy game depicting a torch-bearing warrior exploring a vast cave system with bioluminescent teal mineral deposits. The character navigates through narrow stalactite passages and large caverns while encountering transparent ghostly apparitions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a subterranean network that shifts from wide, bioluminescent chambers into claustrophobic tunnels before opening into a vast, spirit-haunted cavern. It begins in a wide chamber where teal mineral deposits light the ground, moving toward a ghostly figure near an orange-lit opening. As the character pushes forward, the environment constricts into a narrow rocky passage filled with hanging stalactites, causing the orange glow and floor lighting to fade into darkness. The scene then expands into a massive cavern dominated by a glowing teal pool and several apparitions, before the camera follows a spirit into a dark corridor where the pool narrows into a luminous channel on the right. Finally, the path opens once more into a dim area where the torchlight reveals a gathering of ghostly figures standing beside the glowing water.
